shutdownPeriods.comments: On January 8, 2018, Cameco announced the suspension of production and planned transition of the operation into a safe state of care and maintenance at McArthur River. The facility was in care and maintenance for majority of 2022. While there was no production, the facility remained operational (at reduced staffing levels) with a focus on maintaining infrastructure and ongoing water treatment. The facility resumed production in November 2022.
